repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Local-first unified TV/Cast controller with explicit physical-device entity inventories, automatic and manual capability routing, generic application/input discovery, one integration-owned controller per physical TV, diagnostics, activities, Wake-on-LAN and conservative YouTube ad skipping. Version 8.3.2 reissues the runtime fixes through a clean semantic-version transition and a verified deterministic HACS release asset.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Responsive physical-TV controller card with dynamic native/Cast applications, inputs, activities, playback, volume, remote navigation, artwork, diagnostics and YouTube ad-skip controls. Version 1.3.2 preserves the rebuilt controls while forcing a clean HACS update transition with a verified JavaScript release asset.
